text.title: Ops Automation Workflow Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Ops Automation Workflow.

example.scenario: Solo founder with 12 hours / week on manual tasks across CRM + invoicing + support.
example.trace: inventory (14 manual tasks, 6 existing zaps) → scoring → top-3 ROI ranked → 3 owners + monitors assigned → quarterly review in 90 days
